'''Roxi Barl''' was a freelance [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] and thug in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], well known to [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]]. She and her sister, [[Deli Barl|Deli]], long dreamed of getting rich, and finally managed it when Deli married [[CorDuro Shipping|CorDuro's]] [[Vice-President of Fleets]]. He was found murdered after he filed for divorce from Roxi's sister. It was this action that led [[Victor Pomt]] to hire her.

She tried to capture [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in orbit of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] only to be killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] along with one of her cohorts, [[Dex (Peace Brigade)|Dex]].

==Appearances==
